heading: Community
subheading: At our core, we value respect, inclusivity, culture, and empathy. We've built a space where mahjong pros can chase Thirteen Orphans and newcomers can learn the game without feeling intimidated. For us, mahjong is more than just a game. It's a reason for us to actually get together in person and connect. We're here to build a welcoming and special community where members can make lifelong connections and keep this game and its culture thriving for generations. — Jorge Yau, Founder of Lucky Cat Mahjong

events.name: June 2026 Invitational
events.description: Our monthly tournament where our strongest and most deserving players compete to be our Player of the Month. Winner — Jackie Ho

events.name: June 2026 Monthly
events.description: An exclusive tournament celebrating our most active club members at a special Brooklyn venue.

events.name: April Beginner Workshop
events.description: A hands-on intro to Hong Kong mahjong — tiles, melds, and scoring basics for first-time players.
